decision.read: AITER two-stage forward can expose a compact post-activation stage1 tensor on this BF16 path, but that tensor alone is a partial saved-intermediate solution. A production training contract still needs raw gate/up or a fused backward that recomputes gate/up inside the owner kernel while reusing route sorting and compact stage1 where profitable.

backward_reuse_value: Can feed W2 wgrad and W2 dgrad without recomputing hidden.
Can help compute per-route expert output for dTopk if stage2 per-route output is added.
Cannot compute SwiGLU backward by itself because raw gate/up are not recoverable from hidden.
missing_for_full_training_vjp: per-route W2 output before top-k weighted token reduction
stage1_contract.read: For BF16 G1U1 Silu, AITER stage1 is post-activation hidden with shape [tokens, topk, intermediate]. It is not raw gate/up.
